title: HD 145377 b
summary: HD 145377 b is an extrasolar planet located approximately 180 light-years away This planet was discovered on October 26, 2008 by Moutou et al. using the HARPS spectrograph on ESO's 3.6 meter telescope installed at La Silla Observatory in Atacama Desert, Chile.
text: HD 145377 b is an extrasolar planet located approximately 180 light-years away This planet was discovered on October 26, 2008 by Moutou et al. using the HARPS spectrograph on ESO's 3.6 meter telescope installed at La Silla Observatory in Atacama Desert, Chile.
